headline: GoDaddy (GDDY) Valuation Check As New AI Tools And Partnerships Draw Fresh Market Attention
summary: GoDaddy (GDDY) has attracted fresh attention after launching Airo for WordPress, introducing its Agent Name Service for AI agents, and partnering with NACDA and SPORTx to support student-athlete entrepreneurship. See our latest analysis for GoDaddy. Despite launching several AI focused products and partnerships, GoDaddy’s share price has recently moved only modestly, with a 7 day share price return of 3.76% and a 1 month share price return of 5.14%. At the same time, the 1 year total...
